title: DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp: Boosting Long-Context Efficiency with DeepSeek Sparse Attention
preview: Introduces DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) to extend DeepSeek-V3 to very long contexts with sub-linear KV cache memory scaling.
summary: Proposes a sparse attention mechanism that selectively attends to high-importance token positions using learned routing, reducing the KV cache memory footprint for 128K+ context inference. Achieves near-dense accuracy with a fraction of the compute cost for long-document tasks.
datacenter: Addresses one of the most pressing serving scalability challenges: long-context KV cache memory growth. DSA-style methods could enable serving models with 128K–1M context lengths on today's GPU fleet configurations.
metrics: Key result signal: memory reduction factor and accuracy retention for 128K+ context tasks versus full attention baseline.
